introSection: Queen Bee is an inverted kiddie roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It was manufactured by Pinfari and is situated on top of a building. It opened in 2002.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a compact layout, with the lift hill going through a beehive.

fullText:
Queen Bee is an inverted kiddie roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It was manufactured by Pinfari and is situated on top of a building. It opened in 2002.

The ride has a compact layout, with the lift hill going through a beehive.

Each car resembles a bee.
